title: Boston man charged with snatching older women’s purses while riding by them on moped
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Daneuris Diaz, 22, charged with 22 counts linked to nine robberies targeting older women in Boston.
Diaz allegedly used a moped in crimes, with some victims injured during the thefts, officials report.
Authorities identified Diaz through photos and tattoos, leading to the recovery of matching evidence at his home.

title: Norwell issues town-wide boil water order after E. coli detected in water supply
author: Audrey Cooney
bullets: Norwell issues boil water order after E. coli detected in water system; applies to drinking, cooking, and more.
Contamination found in July 7 water sample; town working with Massachusetts DEP to resolve issue quickly.
Bottled water distribution planned; increased chlorination and flushing of water mains underway to address contamination.

title: Willson Contreras to become 1st Red Sox participant in Home Run Derby since 2011
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Willson Contreras to participate in the MLB Home Run Derby, first Red Sox player since 2011.
Contreras has hit 20 home runs in 88 games this season for the Boston Red Sox.
Contreras is replacing Vladimir Guerrero Jr. in the All-Star events, marking his fourth career All-Star appearance.

title: Democrat Graham Platner says he plans to withdraw from Maine Senate race after sexual assault claim
author: The Associated Press
bullets: Graham Platner announced plans to withdraw from the Maine Senate race after a sexual assault allegation surfaced.
Platner's withdrawal complicates Democratic efforts to unify the party and replace him on the ballot before midterm elections.
State law allows Democrats to select a new nominee by July 27 if Platner formally withdraws by July 13.

title: Elias Lindholm remains an uncomfortable question mark for retooling Bruins
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Elias Lindholm's performance with the Boston Bruins has been hampered by injuries and has not met expectations.
Lindholm's contract with Boston is considered problematic, with five years remaining at a $7.75 million annual cap hit.
Lindholm may be relegated to a middle-six role as younger players become more integral to the team's future lineup.

title: Boston Councilor Julia Mejia suffers medical emergency during City Council meeting
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Councilor Julia Mejia experienced a medical emergency during a Boston City Council meeting, pausing proceedings for 30 minutes.
Emergency medical services transported Mejia to a local hospital; she appeared conscious when taken out on a stretcher.
Mayor Michelle Wu reported Mejia is "doing well" and expressed wishes for her swift and full recovery.

title: My truck’s air conditioner only works when set to full blast
author: John Paul
bullets: The truck's AC likely has a faulty blower motor resistor causing it to work only on high settings.
Replacement of a 2007 Ford F-150 blower motor resistor typically costs between $20 and $65 and takes 30 minutes.
Poor quality online parts are an issue, so buying from reputable suppliers is recommended.

title: ‘Nine amazing years’: Jayson Tatum on his relationship with Jaylen Brown
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Jayson Tatum reflects positively on his nine seasons with Jaylen Brown despite recent trade to the 76ers.
Tatum and Brown won the NBA championship in 2024 as Boston Celtics teammates.
Celtics traded Brown to Philadelphia for Paul George and draft picks; Tatum had no input in decision.

title: 4 standout moments from Tom Brady’s appearance on New Heights
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Tom Brady discussed his 'welcome to the NFL moment' involving a hit by Buffalo's Nate Clements in his 2001 season.
Brady highlighted Randy Moss's catch in 2007 as a key moment indicating a special Patriots season.
Brady dismissed the Belichick vs. Brady debate as 'dumb,' emphasizing the importance of every team member.

title: France vs. Morocco World Cup tickets: Here’s how much last-minute seats cost at Boston Stadium
author: Annie Jonas
bullets: The France vs. Morocco World Cup quarterfinal will be held at Gillette Stadium in Foxborough on July 9.
Last-minute ticket prices range from $2,182.48 on Vivid Seats to $3,290 via FIFA Last-Minute Sales.
France is ranked No. 1 and Morocco No. 6 in the latest FIFA rankings ahead of Thursday's match.
